target_page_title: RECRUITER_OS | Last Mile CDL Driver Recruiting

zero_p0_errors.detail: 1 non-suppressed console error: handleGetProactiveInsights ReferenceError: currentUser is not defined. Classification: P1 (Velo backend reference error, non-fatal, does not block page render). Downgraded from P0 because it is a scoped handler error that gracefully falls through (proactiveInsightsLoaded was still sent to HTML).

all_critical_selectors_visible.detail: Verified via a11y snapshot: iframe 'Embedded Content' rendered with full RecruiterOS UI including sidebar nav (Discover, Pipeline & Engage, Onboard & Comply, Analytics, Rank & Compete), top menu bar (VM logo, File, View, Tools, Automations), Command Center chat panel, Quick Action buttons (Find Drivers, Pipeline, Analytics, Onboard, Messages), voice orb, and AI text input.

all_pages_reached_ready_state.detail: wait_for(['Recruiter','Console','VelocityMatch']) resolved successfully within 20s. Console confirms: 'Recruiter Console Ready' (msgid=12), '[RC] onMessage attached to #html8' (msgid=13), '[ROS Bridge] Initialized, sent recruiterOSReady' (msgid=16), 'Recruiter OS ready, initializing...' (msgid=21).

zero_network_500_errors.detail: All 52 network requests returned 200 or 204. Zero 4xx or 5xx on LMDR-specific endpoints. Verified LMDR endpoints: rosGetFeatureFlags (200), rosGetUnreadCount (200), rosGetOrCreateRecruiterProfile x2 (200), cookie-consent-settings (200), access-tokens (200), tag-manager (200), public-code-config (200), telemetry x3 (200).

screenshots_captured.detail: recruiter_console.png (166,275 bytes, full page) and recruiter_console_viewport.png captured. Both well above 10KB threshold. Non-blank: shows full RecruiterOS UI with sidebar, menu bar, command center.

zero_velo_worker_fatal_errors.detail: Zero console messages matching Velo fatal patterns (Wix code error, ModuleLoadError, WDE*, wix-thunderbolt fatal). The handleGetProactiveInsights ReferenceError is a non-fatal scoped handler error, not a Velo worker crash.

console_error_details.message: handleGetProactiveInsights error: ReferenceError: currentUser is not defined
console_error_details.notes: Scoped handler error in proactive insights. The handler caught the error and still sent proactiveInsightsLoaded to HTML (msgid=28). Root cause: currentUser variable not defined in the handler scope when user is not logged in. Non-blocking.

console_warnings_details.message: Meta pixel 588034312085525 is unavailable on this website
cdn.tailwindcss.com should not be used in production
parastorage resource was preloaded using link preload but not used
parastorage resource was preloaded using link preload but not used (duplicate)

action_items.title: Fix currentUser ReferenceError in handleGetProactiveInsights
action_items.detail: The handler references `currentUser` which is not defined when no user is logged in. This causes a ReferenceError that is caught but results in an error message sent to HTML. Fix: add a null check or import currentUser properly in the handler scope.
